name: Interactive AI agent with chat and tools
description: An AI agent with a chat interface. Takes a user question, searches the web via Exa for real-time information, uses Claude to synthesize a comprehensive answer with tool-like capabilities, and delivers the result to Slack with rich Block Kit formatting.

source.originalName: Build an interactive AI agent with chat interface and multiple tools

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for web search

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting results

question.description: The user question or task for the AI agent

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the response

agentMode.description: Agent mode: research (web search + analysis), calculate (math/logic), create (content generation)

steps.name: Classify the user task and determine agent strategy
Search the web via Exa for relevant information
Build Claude prompt for agent response
